Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 22
DMG: 10 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +3
SV POISON: +10
Effect: Velium Shards (Combat, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 5.0 Size: TINY
Class: WAR RNG SHD BRD ROG BST
Race: ALL

Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

31 posts

▲ Page top
proccing and price
QuoteReply
# Dec 02 2003 at 6:57 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591795689641
5 posts
Bought this for 35p in baz (on Rodcet server) for my level 33 rogue. My dexterity was 150+ with gear that cost less than 1700p altogether. Retired the 33 rogue and started a new one, twinked it with this and enough gear to get dex to about 125. Procced at level 2. Total cost of gear on new rogue is less than 600p on rodcet.

▲ Page top
DEX is more important than level for the proc
QuoteReply
# Apr 20 2003 at 8:44 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591787258418
Scholar
29 posts
A RL friend of mine just started playing EQ today with a rogue character, and I twinked him. This was the weapon I got for him. I twinked his DEX up to 151 and this started proc'ing for him around level 3 or 4. So, high DEX can make this thing proc I would think at any level. It's probably a combo of both factors.
▲ Page top
DEX question
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2003 at 3:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591784541718
View User Forum
57 posts
I know that I am a total n00b, but can anyone tell me how the H**L you get DEX up to 176? I just bought a Centi Shortsword for my offhand and now I need to upgrade my Jagged Chokadai Spine for something faster and more damaging. This looks like it will definitely do the trick. But I also have a Smoldering Brand that proc's sometimes with my DEX at 97. It would really be nice if I knew how to get DEX up to almost 200. What a deadly Rogue I would be................
▲ Page top
RE: DEX question
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2003 at 11:07 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592252490012
485 posts
All gear my man. I've been getting a lot of DEX gear lately because my STR is maxing out with small buffs. Try cheap upgrades like Cougar Claw Earrings, Black Pearl Velium Rings, Fire Emerald Velium Rings, or a Spider Fur Belt, and always check out people's Magelo profiles to look at their gear, mine for instance. I have 9 +DEX items, and Epic, giving me an extra 71DEX to 161DEX.

It's all in the gear, and it's perfectly plausible, if you concentrate on DEX gear, to get your DEX to 175 or more.

You're only 14 though, so money's tough to make. Just hang in there.
▲ Page top
DMG DLY change
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2002 at 5:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591783414703
4 posts
Since no one has said any thing The the dmg is 10 but dly is 20 I made shure to check it out on my 45 rogue who uses this in the secondary (it procs like mad at least 4 times a fight with 176 dex) works well till i get RageBringer:)


Accuracy and Strength outweighs Speed and Precision

this dropped yesterday...it is as it shows in the screenshot...10 22...and the reason it proc'd so much is because you have 176 dex

QuoteReply
# Oct 15 2002 at 6:30 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245873114
23 posts
You will need a magic weapon to be able to backstab a mob that can only be hit by magical attacks.
▲ Page top
lucky me
QuoteReply
# Jun 09 2002 at 7:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779252985
4 posts
thats almost impossible i would say for u to buy it off a merchant for 5gp because thats unreal! please stop pulling peoples leg and keep with the original story
▲ Page top
RE: lucky me
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2002 at 3:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255687052
1 post
Actually, I just picked one of these up off of a vendor for 5 GP myself. A lot of times vendors have wacky prices. They often sell fairly common items that wouldn't normally be worth much at exaggerated prices, and then sell a much better high end weapon for chump change.

In the same way I've found a Runic Carver for 8 pp, a Centi Warspear for 9 pp, and a Velium War Maul for less then 1 GP. It really pays to check out what the vendors have on them sometimes, you never know what kind of nice deal you might come up with. Happy shopping everyone. 8)
▲ Page top

21 posts

▲ Page top
new toy
QuoteReply
# Apr 18 2002 at 2:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591762349640
View User Forum
52 posts
was hanging out in EC auctioning looking for a shaded dagger or similar piercer for 1k, as my rogue needed to replace his JCS guild loaner. had a guy willing to sell a shaded for 1500, when along came a kind ranger who said he'd part with this for 900. snatched it up and went to oasis looking for something to stick. awesome weapon, at level 17 im hitting for around 18-22 a pop, BS for 70 or so, and the thing procs like mad! does eat up the stamina in prolonged fights, but man is this thing awesome for the money. hands down a great investment.
▲ Page top
